stations.name: Closest stations are Milton and Auchenflower

buses.note: Bus routes serve Paddington via Latrobe Terrace, Given Terrace, and Caxton Street.

driving.motorway_access: Inner City Bypass and Western Freeway access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 5 to 9 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Walking access to the CBD via Caxton Street

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Latrobe Terrace and Given Terrace form the suburb's village shopping and dining strip with cafes, restaurants, boutiques, and bars. Caxton Street has additional bars and dining.
lifestyle.topography_note: Paddington is hilly. Many streets sit on ridges with city or western outlooks.

pockets.name: Latrobe Terrace village
pockets.character: Streets close to the village strip. Heritage character queenslanders. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Caxton Street side
pockets.character: Streets close to Caxton Street and Suncorp Stadium.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers wanting walk-to-CBD or short-drive lifestyle with character home stock.
Heritage queenslander stock attracts buyers looking for renovation projects.
Parents targeting the catchment and the village amenity.
